pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version to 3.5.0 to align with the new framework release.
Update the project's own artifact version to 3.5.0 to match the Spring Boot versioning scheme.
Update the project description text to reflect the new Spring Boot version number.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade the OpenAPI/Swagger dependency version to 2.8.8.
Upgrade the MapStruct dependency version to 1.6.3.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Changed the CI workflow trigger from the 'develop' branch to the 'master' branch.
Upgraded the GitHub Actions checkout action from version 3 to version 4.
Upgraded the GitHub Actions setup-java action from version 3 to version 4.
Updated the Java version used in the CI environment from JDK 17 to JDK 21.
Added a 'latest' tag to the Docker image push configuration alongside the versioned tag.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Amazon Corretto 21 to align with the Java 21 migration.

README.md.general_idea: Update the README documentation to reflect the new Spring Boot version 3.5.0.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the Docker image tag in docker-compose.yml to match the new Spring Boot 3.5.0 release.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Update the Swagger/OpenAPI application description and version to reflect the upgrade to Spring Boot 3.5.0.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Changed app-description to 'Spring Boot(3.5.0)' and app-version to '3.5.0' in application.yml
